body_txt: A cartoon and comic trope. A character having a bad day , or who is particularly depressed, will have their own small dark cloud following them, often raining and occasionally hitting them with lightning . The more depressed they are, the more it will be just rain; lightning, particularly a lot of it, often indicates an angry mood. Compare to The Stormbringer and Fisher King for this trope on a much grander scale. If the cloud has a mind of its own it may be a Cumulonemesis .
